summary: Test MCP servers like a real AI client, not just a ping Discussion | Link
content: OpenStatus is an open-source uptime and synthetic monitoring platform. Monitor your API and website globally. Showcase your reliability with a public status page. Get started for free.
chineseSummary: 像真正的 AI 客户端一样测试 MCP 服务器，而不仅仅是 ping 讨论 |关联
chineseContent: OpenStatus 是一个开源正常运行时间和综合监控平台。在全球范围内监控您的 API 和网站。通过公共状态页面展示您的可靠性。免费开始使用。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
